title: Multi-Level Clustering UI
description: Use multi-level clustering algorithms from TSP work as the main game mechanic for route design. Create a hierarchy of importance between points and knots (groupings). Players can easily design trade routes with some automation of tedious steps like initial point assignment.
definition-of-done: Hierarchical point/knot system for route design. Visual representation of clusters at multiple levels. Initial point assignment automated. Hierarchy clearly displayed.
testing-plan: Verify clustering produces logical groupings. Test hierarchy visualization. Verify automated initial assignment. Test hierarchy navigation.
todos: DONE: Create visual cluster representation (DrawKnotGradient, DrawMetroDiagram)
DONE: Design hierarchy display system (knotDrawLayer, layer navigation)
unknowns: RESOLVED: Using greedy minimum-delta approach via KnotEngine.findKnots() with disjoint union sets
RESOLVED: Configurable, currently 40 max layers passed to shell.slowSolve()
